title: 「Not even 句」句型
titleEn: Using Not even to strengthen a negative statement

omissions: English translations for Chinese-only teaching explanations are editorial; English content already present in the PDF is retained.
The PDF supplies the lesson title in Chinese only; titleEn is an editorial translation.
Physical page 21 is blank and is therefore excluded from lessonPages, exercisePages and answerPages.

formula: Subject + do / does / did + not even + base verb + other information

formulas.formula: Subject + do / does / did + not even + base verb + other information
Subject + modal verb + not even + base verb + other information
Subject + be + not even + adjective / noun phrase / other information
Subject + have / has / had + not even + past participle + other information

formulas.labelEn: Most surprising person or thing first
formulas.labelZh: 把最令人意外的人或事物放在句首
formulas.formula: Not even + noun phrase + verb + other information

example: In the past, when TV was not even popular, people enjoyed their lives by socialising with one another.
exampleZh: 在過去，當電視甚至還未普及的時候，人們透過互相交往來享受生活。

examples.en: She did not even read the first page.
examples.zh: 她連第一頁也沒有閱讀。

examples.en: The water was not even warm.
They have not even started the meeting.
examples.zh: 他們甚至還未開始會議。

examples.en: Not even the teacher knew the answer.
In the past, when TV was not even popular, people enjoyed their lives by socialising with one another.
examples.zh: 在過去，當電視甚至還未普及的時候，人們透過互相交往來享受生活。

meaning.en: Not even strengthens a negative statement by showing that something very basic, easy, likely or minimally expected did not happen or is not true. It often conveys surprise, disappointment, criticism or emphasis.
meaning.zh: Not even 用來加強否定語氣，表示一件非常基本、非常容易、最有可能或最低限度應該發生的事情，也沒有發生或並不成立。它通常帶有驚訝、失望、批評或強調的語氣。

benefits.en: It makes the strength of the negative meaning clear by showing that the missing event or item was very basic, easy or expected.
benefits.zh: 讓否定語氣更加清楚：不只是表示某件事沒有發生，還能讓讀者知道，沒有發生的事情其實非常基本、容易或值得期待。

benefits.en: It highlights the lowest or simplest expectation and can show that someone failed to complete even the easiest step.
benefits.zh: 突出最低或最基本的要求，指出某人連最簡單的一步也沒有完成。

benefits.en: It makes descriptions and opinions more vivid by naturally conveying surprise, disappointment or criticism.
benefits.zh: 令描述和意見更有畫面，自然表達驚訝、失望或批評。

benefits.en: It can replace a longer explanation of how something failed to perform its most basic task.
benefits.zh: 可以縮短較長的解釋，不必使用「連最基本的事情也無法做到」等較長說法。

benefits.en: It provides useful speaking and writing frames such as “I did not even...”, “She could not even...”, “They have not even...”, “It was not even...” and “Not even the...”.
benefits.zh: 提供實用的說話及寫作框架，例如「I did not even...」、「She could not even...」、「They have not even...」、「It was not even...」及「Not even the...」。

rules.en: Place not even before the part you want to emphasise.
rules.zh: Not even 要放在想強調的部分之前。
examples: She did not even call me.
The room was not even clean.

rules.en: After do, does or did, use the base form of the verb.
rules.zh: 使用 do、does 或 did 時，後面的動詞須使用原形。
examples: Correct: He did not even read the message.
Incorrect: He did not even readed the message.

rules.en: With a modal verb or perfect tense, place not even after the first auxiliary verb.
rules.zh: 情態動詞或完成時態中，not even 放在第一個助動詞之後。
examples: The work had not even begun.

rules.en: When Not even + person or thing is the subject, do not use inversion. This lesson does not cover advanced inversion such as “Not even once did he apologise.”
rules.zh: Not even + 人或事物作主語時，不需要倒裝。本練習不包括「Not even once did he apologise.」等較高階的倒裝句。
examples: Correct: Not even the manager understood the problem.
Incorrect: Not even the manager did understand the problem.

rules.en: Do not turn every ordinary negative sentence into not even. Use it only when the missing or untrue point is surprisingly basic or expected.
rules.zh: 不要把每一個普通否定句都改成 not even。只有當句子帶有「這一點也沒有，實在令人意外」的意思時，才適合使用 not even。
examples: He does not even like coffee, although he works in a café.

rules.en: Not even strengthens a negative meaning. Even though means “although”, even if introduces a hypothetical condition, and not only adds another piece of information.
rules.zh: not even 加強否定，表示「連……也不」；even though 表示「儘管」；even if 表示「即使」，提出一個假設條件；not only 表示「不但」，用來加入另一項資料。
examples: Even though he was tired, he continued working.
Even if it rains, we will go.
She is not only patient but also helpful.

sourceOmissions: English translations for Chinese-only teaching explanations are editorial; English content already present in the PDF is retained.
The PDF supplies the lesson title in Chinese only; titleEn is an editorial translation.
Physical page 21 is blank and is therefore excluded from lessonPages, exercisePages and answerPages.

en: Rewrite each sentence using not even to emphasise the surprising or minimum negative fact.
Keep the important meaning and tense of the original sentence.
The first word of each answer has been provided.
zh: 使用 not even 改寫以下句子，突出「連最基本、最容易或最有可能的事情也沒有發生或並不成立」。
保留原句的重要意思和時態。
每題已提供答案的第一個字。

questions.prompt: Mia received the important message but failed to open it.
questions.promptZh: 米婭收到那則重要訊息，卻沒有把它打開。
questions.answer: Mia did not even open the important message.
questions.answerZh: 米婭連那則重要訊息也沒有打開。
questions.highlight: Mia did not even open the important message.

questions.prompt: The room lacked something as basic as a chair.
questions.promptZh: 這個房間欠缺椅子這種基本物品。
questions.answer: The room did not even have a chair.
questions.answerZh: 這個房間連一張椅子也沒有。
questions.highlight: The room did not even have a chair.

questions.prompt: Ben could not remember my name, although it was the simplest detail.
questions.promptZh: 本記不起我的名字，儘管這是最簡單的資料。
questions.answer: Ben could not even remember my name.
questions.answerZh: 本連我的名字也記不起。
questions.highlight: Ben could not even remember my name.

questions.prompt: We expected the soup to be hot, but it was not warm at all.
questions.promptZh: 我們原以為湯會是熱的，但它完全不暖。
questions.answer: We expected the soup to be hot, but it was not even warm.
questions.answerZh: 我們原以為湯會是熱的，但它甚至連暖也稱不上。
questions.highlight: We expected the soup to be hot, but it was not even warm.

questions.prompt: It is already late, but Ava has not started her homework.
questions.promptZh: 時間已經很晚，但艾娃仍未開始做功課。
questions.answer: It is already late, but Ava has not even started her homework.
questions.answerZh: 時間已經很晚，但艾娃甚至還未開始做功課。
questions.highlight: It is already late, but Ava has not even started her homework.

questions.prompt: Who was most likely to know the answer? Tom was, but he did not know it.
questions.promptZh: 誰最有可能知道答案？湯姆最有可能，但他也不知道。
questions.answer: Not even Tom knew the answer.
questions.answerZh: 連湯姆也不知道答案。
questions.highlight: Not even Tom knew the answer.

questions.prompt: The baby cannot stand yet, so walking is clearly impossible.
questions.promptZh: 嬰兒仍未能站立，因此當然不可能走路。
questions.answer: The baby cannot even stand yet, let alone walk.
questions.answerZh: 嬰兒連站立也未能做到，更不用說走路。
questions.highlight: The baby cannot even stand yet, let alone walk.

questions.prompt: The shop failed to display something as basic as its opening hours.
questions.promptZh: 這間店舖沒有展示營業時間這項基本資料。
questions.answer: The shop did not even display its opening hours.
questions.answerZh: 這間店舖連營業時間也沒有展示。
questions.highlight: The shop did not even display its opening hours.

questions.prompt: The alarm rang loudly, but I failed to hear it.
questions.promptZh: 鬧鐘大聲響起，但我沒有聽見。
questions.answer: I did not even hear the alarm, although it rang loudly.
questions.answerZh: 雖然鬧鐘大聲響起，但我連鬧鐘聲也沒有聽見。
questions.highlight: I did not even hear the alarm, although it rang loudly.

questions.prompt: At a time when online shopping had not yet become common, people visited local shops more often.
questions.promptZh: 在網上購物尚未普及的年代，人們較常到本地店舖購物。
questions.answer: When online shopping was not even common, people visited local shops more often.
questions.answerZh: 當網上購物甚至尚未普及時，人們較常到本地店舖購物。
questions.highlight: When online shopping was not even common, people visited local shops more often.

questions.prompt: Daniel left without thanking the woman who helped him.
questions.promptZh: 丹尼爾離開時沒有感謝那位幫助他的女士。
questions.answer: Daniel did not even thank the woman who helped him.
questions.answerZh: 丹尼爾連那位幫助他的女士也沒有感謝。
questions.highlight: Daniel did not even thank the woman who helped him.

questions.prompt: The old phone could not perform a basic task such as sending a photo.
questions.promptZh: 這部舊電話無法完成傳送相片這種基本工作。
questions.answer: The old phone could not even send a photo.
questions.answerZh: 這部舊電話連一張相片也無法傳送。
questions.highlight: The old phone could not even send a photo.

questions.prompt: Had we reached the station when the rain began? No, it started before we arrived.
questions.promptZh: 雨開始下時，我們到達車站了嗎？還沒有，雨在我們到達前便開始下。
questions.answer: We had not even reached the station when the rain began.
questions.answerZh: 雨開始下時，我們甚至還未到達車站。
questions.highlight: We had not even reached the station when the rain began.

questions.prompt: No student at all volunteered to answer.
questions.promptZh: 完全沒有學生自願回答。
questions.answer: Not even one student volunteered to answer.
questions.answerZh: 連一名學生也沒有自願回答。
questions.highlight: Not even one student volunteered to answer.

questions.prompt: The hotel room was so small that it could not hold two suitcases.
questions.promptZh: 酒店房間太小，無法容納兩個行李箱。
questions.answer: The hotel room was not even large enough to hold two suitcases.
questions.answerZh: 酒店房間甚至連容納兩個行李箱也不夠大。
questions.highlight: The hotel room was not even large enough to hold two suitcases.

questions.prompt: Chloe bought the dress without looking at the price first.
questions.promptZh: 克洛伊買下裙子前沒有先看價錢。
questions.answer: Chloe did not even look at the price before buying the dress.
questions.answerZh: 克洛伊買下裙子前，連價錢也沒有看。
questions.highlight: Chloe did not even look at the price before buying the dress.

questions.prompt: The team has failed to win a single match this season.
questions.promptZh: 球隊今季一場比賽也未能勝出。
questions.answer: The team has not even won a single match this season.
questions.answerZh: 球隊今季連一場比賽也未曾勝出。
questions.highlight: The team has not even won a single match this season.

questions.prompt: The instructions were so unclear that I could not complete the first step.
questions.promptZh: 指示非常不清楚，因此我無法完成第一個步驟。
questions.answer: The instructions were so unclear that I could not even complete the first step.
questions.answerZh: 指示非常不清楚，令我甚至連第一個步驟也無法完成。
questions.highlight: The instructions were so unclear that I could not even complete the first step.

questions.prompt: Ethan failed to realise that the meeting had been cancelled.
questions.promptZh: 伊森沒有察覺會議已被取消。
questions.answer: Ethan did not even realise that the meeting had been cancelled.
questions.answerZh: 伊森甚至沒有察覺會議已被取消。
questions.highlight: Ethan did not even realise that the meeting had been cancelled.

questions.prompt: At a time when the village had no electricity at all, families had to rely on oil lamps.
questions.promptZh: 在村落完全沒有電力的年代，家庭只好依靠油燈。
questions.answer: When the village did not even have electricity, families had to rely on oil lamps.
questions.answerZh: 當村落甚至連電力也沒有時，家庭只好依靠油燈。
questions.highlight: When the village did not even have electricity, families had to rely on oil lamps.

questions.prompt: Who was most likely to explain the strange result? The teacher was, but she could not explain it.
questions.promptZh: 誰最有可能解釋這個奇怪結果？老師最有可能，但她也無法解釋。
questions.answer: Not even the teacher could explain the strange result.
questions.answerZh: 連老師也無法解釋這個奇怪結果。
questions.highlight: Not even the teacher could explain the strange result.

questions.prompt: Patients started arriving before the clinic had received the medicine.
questions.promptZh: 診所尚未收到藥物，病人便已開始到達。
questions.answer: The clinic had not even received the medicine when patients started arriving.
questions.answerZh: 病人開始到達時，診所甚至還未收到藥物。
questions.highlight: The clinic had not even received the medicine when patients started arriving.

questions.prompt: Sarah arrived at the written test without a pen, although it was the most basic item she needed.
questions.promptZh: 莎拉參加筆試時沒有帶筆，儘管這是她最基本需要的物品。
questions.answer: Sarah did not even bring a pen to the written test.
questions.answerZh: 莎拉參加筆試時，連一支筆也沒有帶。
questions.highlight: Sarah did not even bring a pen to the written test.

questions.prompt: The child could not reach the lowest shelf because she was still too short.
questions.promptZh: 那個孩子仍然太矮，因此無法碰到最低的層架。
questions.answer: The child was not even tall enough to reach the lowest shelf.
questions.answerZh: 那個孩子甚至連碰到最低層架也不夠高。
questions.highlight: The child was not even tall enough to reach the lowest shelf.

questions.prompt: The company ignored our first email and sent no reply.
questions.promptZh: 公司忽略了我們的第一封電郵，沒有作出回覆。
questions.answer: The company did not even reply to our first email.
questions.answerZh: 公司連我們的第一封電郵也沒有回覆。
questions.highlight: The company did not even reply to our first email.

questions.prompt: Despite its high price, the machine was unable to process a simple request.
questions.promptZh: 儘管價格高昂，這部機器仍無法處理一項簡單要求。
questions.answer: Despite its high price, the machine could not even process a simple request.
questions.answerZh: 儘管價格高昂，這部機器連一項簡單要求也無法處理。
questions.highlight: Despite its high price, the machine could not even process a simple request.

questions.prompt: No one spoke. The chairperson, who was expected to lead, also made no comment.
questions.promptZh: 沒有人發言。原本應該帶領會議的主席也沒有作出評論。
questions.answer: No one spoke; not even the chairperson made a comment.
questions.answerZh: 沒有人發言；連主席也沒有作出評論。
questions.highlight: No one spoke; not even the chairperson made a comment.

questions.prompt: What happened before I finished my first sentence? The microphone stopped working.
questions.promptZh: 我說完第一句前發生了甚麼事？麥克風停止了運作。
questions.answer: I had not even finished my first sentence when the microphone stopped working.
questions.answerZh: 麥克風停止運作時，我甚至還未說完第一句。
questions.highlight: I had not even finished my first sentence when the microphone stopped working.

questions.prompt: The emergency bag lacked a basic item: a torch.
questions.promptZh: 緊急用品袋欠缺一件基本物品：電筒。
questions.answer: The emergency bag did not even contain a torch.
questions.answerZh: 緊急用品袋連一支電筒也沒有。
questions.highlight: The emergency bag did not even contain a torch.

questions.prompt: Although the café was called “Green Garden”, it failed to do something as basic as recycling its bottles.
questions.promptZh: 儘管這間咖啡店名為「綠色花園」，它沒有做到回收瓶子這項基本事情。
questions.answer: Although the café was called “Green Garden”, it did not even recycle its bottles.
questions.answerZh: 儘管這間咖啡店名為「綠色花園」，它連自己的瓶子也沒有回收。
questions.highlight: Although the café was called “Green Garden”, it did not even recycle its bottles.

questions.prompt: The password lacked a basic security feature: a number.
questions.promptZh: 這個密碼欠缺一項基本保安元素：數字。
questions.answer: The password did not even contain a number.
questions.answerZh: 這個密碼連一個數字也沒有。
questions.highlight: The password did not even contain a number.

questions.prompt: Without an identity card, you are unable to enter the building.
questions.promptZh: 沒有身分證明文件，你便無法進入大樓。
questions.answer: Without an identity card, you cannot even enter the building.
questions.answerZh: 沒有身分證明文件，你甚至連大樓也無法進入。
questions.highlight: Without an identity card, you cannot even enter the building.

questions.prompt: The new employee started work before anyone showed her where the fire exits were.
questions.promptZh: 新員工開始工作前，沒有人向她指出走火通道的位置。
questions.answer: The new employee had not even been shown where the fire exits were when she started work.
questions.answerZh: 新員工開始工作時，甚至還沒有人向她指出走火通道的位置。
questions.highlight: The new employee had not even been shown where the fire exits were when she started work.

questions.prompt: The charity event raised less money than it needed to cover its own costs.
questions.promptZh: 慈善活動籌得的款項不足以支付本身的開支。
questions.answer: The charity event did not even raise enough money to cover its own costs.
questions.answerZh: 慈善活動甚至連支付本身開支所需的款項也籌不到。
questions.highlight: The charity event did not even raise enough money to cover its own costs.

questions.prompt: Could a heavy coat keep us warm in the wind? No, the wind was too cold.
questions.promptZh: 厚外套能讓我們在風中保暖嗎？不能，風實在太寒冷。
questions.answer: Not even a heavy coat could keep us warm in the wind.
questions.answerZh: 在寒風中，連厚外套也無法令我們保暖。
questions.highlight: Not even a heavy coat could keep us warm in the wind.

questions.prompt: The speaker talked so quietly that people in the front row could not hear her.
questions.promptZh: 講者說話太小聲，前排的人也聽不到她說話。
questions.answer: The speaker talked so quietly that people in the front row could not even hear her.
questions.answerZh: 講者說話太小聲，連前排的人也聽不到她說話。
questions.highlight: The speaker talked so quietly that people in the front row could not even hear her.

questions.prompt: By noon, the repair team still had not identified the cause of the problem.
questions.promptZh: 到了中午，維修團隊仍未找出問題的原因。
questions.answer: By noon, the repair team had not even identified the cause of the problem.
questions.answerZh: 到了中午，維修團隊甚至還未找出問題的原因。
questions.highlight: By noon, the repair team had not even identified the cause of the problem.

questions.prompt: The report was sent to the client without being checked first.
questions.promptZh: 報告未經檢查便被傳送給客戶。
questions.answer: The report was not even checked before it was sent to the client.
questions.answerZh: 報告傳送給客戶前，甚至連檢查也沒有進行。
questions.highlight: The report was not even checked before it was sent to the client.

questions.prompt: Leo apologised, but he gave no explanation of what had happened.
questions.promptZh: 里奧道了歉，但沒有解釋發生了甚麼事。
questions.answer: Leo apologised, but he did not even explain what had happened.
questions.answerZh: 里奧道了歉，但甚至沒有解釋發生了甚麼事。
questions.highlight: Leo apologised, but he did not even explain what had happened.

questions.prompt: At a time when the internet was unavailable in most homes, students depended more on libraries.
questions.promptZh: 在大部分家庭都未能使用互聯網的年代，學生更依賴圖書館。
questions.answer: When the internet was not even available in most homes, students depended more on libraries.
questions.answerZh: 當大部分家庭甚至還未能使用互聯網時，學生更依賴圖書館。
questions.highlight: When the internet was not even available in most homes, students depended more on libraries.

questions.prompt: The security guard let the visitor in without asking him to show identification.
questions.promptZh: 保安員沒有要求訪客出示身分證明，便讓他進入。
questions.answer: The security guard did not even ask the visitor to show identification before letting him in.
questions.answerZh: 保安員讓訪客進入前，連身分證明也沒有要求他出示。
questions.highlight: The security guard did not even ask the visitor to show identification before letting him in.

questions.prompt: The hospital had delayed the operation but had not informed the family, although this was a basic responsibility.
questions.promptZh: 醫院延遲了手術，卻沒有通知家屬，儘管這是基本責任。
questions.answer: Although informing the family was a basic responsibility, the hospital had not even informed them that the operation had been delayed.
questions.answerZh: 儘管通知家屬是基本責任，醫院甚至沒有告知他們手術已被延遲。
questions.highlight: Although informing the family was a basic responsibility, the hospital had not even informed them that the operation had been delayed.

questions.prompt: Could the most experienced technician recover the damaged files? No, that technician was also unable to do so.
questions.promptZh: 最有經驗的技術員能復原受損的檔案嗎？不能，那名技術員也無法做到。
questions.answer: Not even the most experienced technician could recover the damaged files.
questions.answerZh: 連最有經驗的技術員也無法復原受損的檔案。
questions.highlight: Not even the most experienced technician could recover the damaged files.

questions.prompt: The proposal was extremely incomplete and lacked an estimated cost, one of the most basic details.
questions.promptZh: 這份建議書極不完整，並欠缺預計成本這項最基本資料。
questions.answer: The proposal was so incomplete that it did not even include an estimated cost.
questions.answerZh: 這份建議書極不完整，甚至連預計成本也沒有包括。
questions.highlight: The proposal was so incomplete that it did not even include an estimated cost.

questions.prompt: The company launched the app although it had not tested the payment system, which was a basic step.
questions.promptZh: 公司推出應用程式時，仍未測試付款系統，儘管這是基本步驟。
questions.answer: The company launched the app although it had not even tested the payment system.
questions.answerZh: 公司推出應用程式時，甚至還未測試付款系統。
questions.highlight: The company launched the app although it had not even tested the payment system.

questions.prompt: The council closed the community centre without consulting residents first.
questions.promptZh: 區議會沒有先諮詢居民，便關閉了社區中心。
questions.answer: The council did not even consult residents before closing the community centre.
questions.answerZh: 區議會關閉社區中心前，連居民也沒有諮詢。
questions.highlight: The council did not even consult residents before closing the community centre.

questions.prompt: The manager told us to start the machine before we had completed the safety checks.
questions.promptZh: 我們尚未完成安全檢查，經理便叫我們啟動機器。
questions.answer: We had not even completed the safety checks when the manager told us to start the machine.
questions.answerZh: 經理叫我們啟動機器時，我們甚至還未完成安全檢查。
questions.highlight: We had not even completed the safety checks when the manager told us to start the machine.

questions.prompt: The witness was so nervous that she could not state her full name clearly.
questions.promptZh: 證人非常緊張，無法清楚說出自己的全名。
questions.answer: The witness was so nervous that she could not even state her full name clearly.
questions.answerZh: 證人非常緊張，連自己的全名也無法清楚說出。
questions.highlight: The witness was so nervous that she could not even state her full name clearly.

questions.prompt: The detailed instructions failed to help the users complete the final stage.
questions.promptZh: 詳細指示未能幫助使用者完成最後階段。
questions.answer: Not even the detailed instructions helped the users complete the final stage.
questions.answerZh: 連詳細指示也無法幫助使用者完成最後階段。
questions.highlight: Not even the detailed instructions helped the users complete the final stage.

questions.prompt: Doctors tried to reduce patients’ pain at a time when scientists still had not discovered the cause of the disease.
questions.promptZh: 在科學家仍未找出疾病成因的年代，醫生已嘗試減輕病人的痛楚。
questions.answer: At a time when scientists had not even discovered the cause of the disease, doctors still tried to reduce patients’ pain.
questions.answerZh: 在科學家甚至還未找出疾病成因的年代，醫生仍嘗試減輕病人的痛楚。
questions.highlight: At a time when scientists had not even discovered the cause of the disease, doctors still tried to reduce patients’ pain.
